src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Migrate the Generated annotation import from javax.annotation to jakarta.annotation to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is removed or deprecated in newer Jakarta EE versions; using it causes compilation errors or classpath conflicts when targeting Jakarta EE 9+ environments.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation with jakarta.annotation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; using it causes a compile error (package not found) on JDK 17 with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Fix invalid escape sequence in string literal to comply with stricter Java compiler rules.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Compile error: invalid escape character '\'' in string literal (Java 17 compiler is stricter about unrecognized escape sequences than older versions).

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Migrate javax.annotation import to jakarta.annotation to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.annotation does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (Spring Boot 3).

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace Hibernate5Module with Hibernate5JakartaModule to support Jakarta EE namespace in Jackson configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The class com.fasterxml.jackson.datatype.hibernate5.Hibernate5Module is removed or incompatible in newer Jackson versions targeting Jakarta EE; using the old class causes a compile error (class not found) or runtime linkage error.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated setLabels method with setLabelFilter to align with newer Spring Boot Liquibase integration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The setLabels method is deprecated or removed in newer Spring Boot versions; using it may cause compilation errors or runtime warnings depending on the specific library version.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with functional SecurityFilterChain bean to comply with Spring Security 6 API changes.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter is deprecated in Spring Security 5.7 and removed in Spring Security 6; extending it causes compilation errors or runtime failures in Spring Boot 3.x.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.after:
@Bean
public SecurityFilterChain filterChain(HttpSecurity http) throws Exception

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity with @EnableMethodSecurity to align with Spring Security 6 method security configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity is removed in Spring Security 6; using it results in a compilation error.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update HttpSecurity configuration to use lambda DSLs (e.g., authorizeHttpRequests, csrf, headers) replacing the old fluent API methods.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Methods like authorizeRequests, antMatchers, and the old csrf/header builders are removed in Spring Security 6; code fails to compile without switching to the new lambda-based DSL.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace custom AjaxAuthenticationSuccessHandler/FailureHandler with standard HttpStatus responses to align with modern Spring Security exception handling.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The custom handlers relied on deprecated patterns or removed dependencies; replacing them with standard HttpStatus handlers ensures compatibility with the new exception handling API.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace SecurityProblemSupport with HttpStatusEntryPoint for authentication entry points to remove dependency on removed Zalando Problem library integration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: SecurityProblemSupport is no longer imported or used; the new configuration requires a standard EntryPoint compatible with Spring Security 6.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update header configuration to use the new permissionsPolicy API replacing the deprecated featurePolicy.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: featurePolicy is removed in Spring Security 6; using it causes compilation errors.
